title: Anville
description: Cobblemon, Create and lots of QOL mods, bundled together on their latest available version of Minecraft.
body:
![Anville Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09df249ddf51d210c0a7c5ee4e167c62f73ec087.png)
Cobblemon and Create on 1.21.1 NeoForge. Anville offers a lightweight modpack similar to [Glade](https://modrinth.com/modpack/glade), but with larger content mods. Much like Glade, Anville will update to each new Minecraft version, but only once the content mods have updated too. This means that Anville will update slower than Glade when a new Minecraft version is released. ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b863c38a18b4b0ad4571ad26fd4155da0ba2b125.webp)
### What is Anville? - Anville is lightly modded experience built on the foundation of [Glade](https://modrinth.com/modpack/glade) and its principles. - When Anville updates to a new Minecraft version, you can relax knowing that the modpack will be compatible with your current world. Due to Anville's inclusion of larger content mods, this process will not be as fast as with Glade. - The selection of game-changing content mods is greater than Glade, with large additions such as Create and Cobblemon. Anville remains however a light modpack with little to no overlap in features between selected mods. - There are a myriad of clientside quality of experience mods that enhance visuals, performance and gameplay. This selection may change from version to version but won't affect your worlds. ### Who is this modpack for? - This modpack is for anyone who wants to play a modpack long term, but wants more variety in mods than Glade offers. If you want to be on each new version of Minecraft ASAP, try [Glade](https://modrinth.com/modpack/glade), but if you don't mind waiting for the content mods in Anville to update, try this modpack instead. ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b863c38a18b4b0ad4571ad26fd4155da0ba2b125.webp) ### List of Content Mods - Create - Cobblemon - Basic Weapons - Plushables - Nature's Compass - Supplementaries
